Dressing Discharge Stageable on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of unstageable pressure ulcers due to non-removable dressing/device that were stageable on admission.
210 UNSTGBL_ULCR_AND_OR_ADMSN_NUM UNSTGBL_ULCR_AND_OR_ADMSN_NUM M0300F1 Unstageable Pressure Ulcers Slough and/or Eschar Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of unstageable pressure ulcers at admission due to coverage of wound bed by slough and/or eschar.
211 UNSTGBL_ULCR_AND_OR_DSCHRG_NUM UNSTGBL_ULCR_AND_OR_DSCHRG_NUM M0300F1
